content: Zero, one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten.

relationships: gos:Nul, aine, twije, drije, vare, vieve, zezze, zeuven, aachte, negen, tiene
ltz:Null, eent, zwee, dräi, véier, fënnef, sechs, siwen, aacht, néng, zéng
